name: Thai Reinsurance Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Reinsurance Public Company Limited provides insurance and reinsurance products and services in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Conventional Products and Non-Conventional Products. The company offers reinsurance coverage for property, casualty, accident and health, engineering, and marine cargo. It also provides computer services in relation to motor insurance claim management; claim management and marketing services; and actuarial, training, and advisory services, as well as insurance outsourcing and consulting services. The company develops electronic commerce services. Thai Reinsurance Public Company Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
